title: Elbaf’s Past Turns Violent
description: On pages 10–12, this part follows Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.
scene: Elbaf’s history turns darker as older conflicts, powerful bloodlines, and the roots of hatred behind the present crisis come into focus.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hurry and stop them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You at least moved Shakuyaku, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Saint summers!! About that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Ahhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Saint summers...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me all of them were taken out by one little chained up lady!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Sounds like the pirates out there are really going to town.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: How distasteful... There's nothing less cute...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Smack!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...than a woman who knows her worth!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: So,,.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ouch!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Eeek!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Aaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Y'know, all these pirates are here to take you away.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your popularity's quite the pain. It's certainly made a mess of our journey!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if you survive this, darling will ultimately claim you as his...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No one else really gains anything... so, I'm starting to wonder if it wouldn't just be more fun to kill you here and now?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They've come ALL this way just to save you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...It'd be unfortunate for them to survive hell only to find the mangled corpse of their beloved here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I WONDER WHAT KIND OF FACES THEY'LL MAKE!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Shakky!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We've come to save you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shaky, are you okay?! I'm going to save you now!

summary: This part advances Elbaf’s Violent Past through 24 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
